buildNote.zh: 官网升级 · 双语切换 · 品牌焕新
buildNote.en: Website refresh · bilingual switch · brand update

downloadSub.zh: 官网升级版已公开 · App 产物将在验证完成后单独发布
downloadSub.en: The refreshed website is now public · app builds will be released separately after validation

sysreq.zh: 官网已上线 · 二进制产物后续发布
sysreq.en: Website is live · binaries will follow later

zh: 官网风格升级，品牌图标更新为金色月牙 + 深蓝色 zzz。
新增中英文切换脚手架，先覆盖核心公开页面文案。
应用端 UI 统一、全量双语和正式产物发布继续在验证链路中。
en: The site has been refreshed with the new gold crescent and deep-blue zzz brand mark.
A bilingual switch now covers the core public-facing content in Chinese and English.
App UI alignment, full bilingual product surfaces, and public binaries remain in active validation.
